# Deconvolution

Estimate cell-type proportions in multi-cellular spots (Visium-scale). Requires a scRNA reference for most SOTA methods.

**4 registered method(s)** in this category.

| Method | Maturity | Implementation | Summary | Guide |
|--------|----------|----------------|---------|-------|
| `marker_deconv` | `experimental` | `native` | Marker-gene mean-ratio baseline deconvolution. | [marker_deconv](../generated/marker_deconv.md) |
| `weave_spatial_simplex_deconv` | `experimental` | `native` | Marker evidence projected onto a spatially regularized simplex. | [weave_spatial_simplex_deconv](../generated/weave_spatial_simplex_deconv.md) |
| `cell2location` | `validated` | `external` | Bayesian spatial cell-type abundance estimation with cell2location. | [cell2location](../cell2location.md) |
| `rctd` | `validated` | `external` | RCTD robust cell-type decomposition (spacexr) via R bridge. | [rctd](../generated/rctd.md) |

## Decision notes

### `cell2location`

- Estimate cell-type proportions in multi-cellular spots (Visium-scale).
- Bayesian spatial cell-type abundance estimation with cell2location.
- Requires external backend(s): `cell2location`.
- Full page: [cell2location](../cell2location.md)

### `marker_deconv`

- Teaching / baseline proportion recovery only.
- Marker-gene mean-ratio baseline deconvolution.
- Teaching / baseline method — not a field-standard claim.
- Full page: [marker_deconv](../generated/marker_deconv.md)

### `rctd`

- Estimate cell-type proportions in multi-cellular spots (Visium-scale).
- RCTD robust cell-type decomposition (spacexr) via R bridge.
- SOTA track — fail-closed if the official backend is missing.
- Full page: [rctd](../generated/rctd.md)

### `weave_spatial_simplex_deconv`

- Teaching / baseline proportion recovery only.
- Marker evidence projected onto a spatially regularized simplex.
- Research incubator — do not treat as a production recommendation.
- Full page: [weave_spatial_simplex_deconv](../generated/weave_spatial_simplex_deconv.md)
